name: Rishi
title: AI Product Engineer
bio: The guy who teaches machines to think, designs systems that speak, and turns raw data into digital sorcery. I build for reactions rather than screens. Whether it's an interface or a machine learning model, I craft with intention—where every detail has a role, and every line of code tells the system something new.

projects.name: DashMetrics
projects.description: A minimal and intuitive SaaS platform designed to centralize and simplify social media analytics.

projects.name: NFT Marketplace
projects.description: A decentralized marketplace for digital artists to mint, sell, and trade NFTs with Web 3.0 integration.

projects.name: Nudge: Local Market App
projects.description: A walkthrough marketplace app for local vendors and businesses.

projects.name: Housel: AI Reminder App
projects.description: An intelligent reminder application that learns user's daily routines.

projects.name: AI Content Generator
projects.description: An application leveraging AI to help creators generate unique content for blogs, social media, and marketing.

projects.name: DeFi Dashboard App
projects.description: A mobile app that tracks crypto portfolios, DeFi investments, and provides real-time market analysis.
